description: Complete registry of NOSTR event tags as defined across all NIPs
indexed_tags_note: Single-letter tags (a-z, A-Z) are indexed by relays and can be used in filters as #<letter>

tags.name: Protected Event
tags.description: Marks an event as protected, signaling to relays that it should not be published by other pubkeys.

tags.name: Replaceable Event Coordinates
tags.description: References a replaceable event by its coordinates (kind, pubkey, and d-tag value). Used for parameterized replaceable events.

tags.name: Root Address
tags.description: References the root replaceable event address in a comment thread.

tags.name: Commit ID
tags.description: References a git commit by its SHA hash.

tags.name: Identifier
tags.description: Identifier tag for parameterized replaceable events. Distinguishes events of the same kind from the same pubkey.

tags.name: Day
tags.description: Specifies a calendar day for time-based events.

tags.name: Event Reference
tags.description: References another event by its 32-byte hex ID. Markers: 'reply' (direct parent), 'root' (thread root). Relay URL can be empty string if unknown. Pubkey is the author of the referenced event, supporting outbox model relay lookups.

tags.name: Root Event ID
tags.description: References the root event ID in a comment thread.

tags.name: Currency Code
tags.description: Specifies a currency code for marketplace or trade-related events.

tags.name: Geohash
tags.description: Specifies a geographic location using a geohash string.

tags.name: Group ID
tags.description: Identifies a relay-based group by its group ID.

tags.name: External Identity
tags.description: References an external identity or identifier from outside sources. Proof and URL hint are optional and depend on context.

tags.name: Root External Identity
tags.description: References the root external identity in a comment thread.

tags.name: Kind
tags.description: References a specific event kind number. Used in reactions, reposts, and other events that operate on events of a specific kind.

tags.name: Root Scope
tags.description: Specifies the root scope kind in a comment thread.

tags.name: Label
tags.description: Applies a label to an event. Can also specify language tags per NIP-C0. Must have a corresponding L tag for the namespace.

tags.name: Label Namespace
tags.description: Declares the label namespace used by l tags in the same event. Required when using l tags.

tags.name: MIME Type
tags.description: Specifies the MIME type of a file or content (e.g., 'image/png', 'application/pdf').

tags.name: Pubkey Reference
tags.description: References another user by their 32-byte hex pubkey. Used for mentions, replies (to notify participants), and contact lists. Relay URL and petname are optional.

tags.name: Pubkey (Receiver)
tags.description: References a pubkey, typically used for the receiver in zap receipts or comment threads.

tags.name: Quote Repost
tags.description: References an event being quote-reposted. Similar to e-tag but specifically for quote reposts.

tags.name: Reference / Relay URL
tags.description: Dual purpose: (1) References a web URL the event is referring to (NIP-24/25). (2) Specifies a relay URL with optional read/write marker for relay list metadata (NIP-65).

tags.name: Status
tags.description: Specifies the status of a marketplace or trade-related event.

tags.name: Hashtag
tags.description: Applies a hashtag to the event. The value MUST be a lowercase string.

tags.name: URL
tags.description: Specifies a URL associated with the event.

tags.name: Content Hash
tags.description: SHA-256 hash of referenced content for integrity verification.

tags.name: Platform
tags.description: Specifies the platform for marketplace or trade-related events.

tags.name: Order Number
tags.description: Specifies an order number for marketplace or trade-related events.

tags.name: Alternative Summary
tags.description: Human-readable summary for events with specialized content. Allows clients that don't understand a specific event kind to display a fallback description.

tags.name: Amount
tags.description: Amount in millisatoshis (stringified integer). Used in zap requests and receipts.

tags.name: Lightning Invoice
tags.description: Contains a BOLT-11 Lightning Network invoice string.

tags.name: Branch Name
tags.description: Suggests a branch name for git-related events.

tags.name: Auth Challenge
tags.description: Contains the challenge string received from a relay during NIP-42 authentication.

tags.name: Client
tags.description: Identifies the client application that created the event, including its name and optionally an address reference and relay URL.

tags.name: Git Clone URL
tags.description: Specifies a git clone URL for repository events.

tags.name: Content Warning
tags.description: Marks an event as containing sensitive content with an optional reason string. Clients should hide the content behind a warning.

tags.name: Delegation
tags.description: Indicates the event was delegated from another keypair. Contains the delegator's pubkey, conditions query string, and a signature token.

tags.name: Dependency
tags.description: Specifies a required dependency for executable or application events.

tags.name: Description
tags.description: Provides a textual description. Used in zap receipts (contains the zap request JSON), badge definitions, git repos, and applications.

tags.name: Custom Emoji
tags.description: Defines a custom emoji by mapping a shortcode to an image URL. Referenced in content as :shortcode:.

tags.name: Encrypted
tags.description: Signals that the event content is encrypted. Used in data vending machine (DVM) events.

tags.name: Expiration
tags.description: Unix timestamp (stringified) after which the event should be considered expired. Relays may discard expired events.

tags.name: File Extension
tags.description: Specifies the file extension for executable or application events.

tags.name: File Path
tags.description: Specifies the full file path for torrent or file-related events.

tags.name: Goal
tags.description: References a fundraising goal event by its ID.

tags.name: Git HEAD Reference
tags.description: Specifies the HEAD reference for a git repository, indicating the default branch.

tags.name: Image
tags.description: Specifies an image URL with optional dimensions in pixels (e.g., '1024x768'). Used in long-form content, calendar events, and badge definitions.

tags.name: Inline Metadata
tags.description: Provides inline metadata for URLs referenced in the event content. Each subsequent element is a space-separated key-value pair (e.g., 'url https://...', 'dim 800x600', 'blurhash ...').

tags.name: License
tags.description: Specifies the license for shared content or applications.

tags.name: LNURL
tags.description: Contains a bech32-encoded LNURL for Lightning Network payments.

tags.name: Location
tags.description: Specifies a human-readable location string for calendar events or listings.

tags.name: Merge Base
tags.description: Specifies the merge base commit ID for git patch events.

tags.name: Name
tags.description: Specifies a human-readable name. Used for badge definitions, git repos, community definitions, and applications.

tags.name: Proof of Work Nonce
tags.description: Proof-of-work nonce. The random value is adjusted until the event ID has the required number of leading zero bits specified by the target difficulty.

tags.name: Payment Preimage
tags.description: Contains the preimage (hash) of a BOLT-11 invoice, proving payment was made.

tags.name: Price
tags.description: Specifies a price with currency code and optional frequency for classified listings.

tags.name: Proxy
tags.description: Indicates the event was proxied from another protocol (e.g., ActivityPub, RSS). Contains the external ID and protocol name.

tags.name: Publication Timestamp
tags.description: Unix timestamp (stringified) indicating when the content was originally published. Distinct from created_at which tracks event creation.

tags.name: Relay URL
tags.description: Specifies a relay URL. Used in NIP-42 auth events to identify which relay the auth is for, and in NIP-17 for relay hints.

tags.name: Relay List
tags.description: Lists relay URLs where zap receipts should be published.

tags.name: Repository Reference
tags.description: References the origin repository for executable or application events.

tags.name: Runtime
tags.description: Specifies the runtime or environment specification for executable events.

tags.name: File Storage Server
tags.description: Specifies the URL of a file storage server (Blossom/NIP-96).

tags.name: Sound
tags.description: Defines a custom sound by mapping a shortcode to a sound URL with an optional image URL.

tags.name: Subject
tags.description: Specifies a subject line for messages, direct messages, or git patches.

tags.name: Summary
tags.description: Short summary of the event content. Used in long-form articles and calendar events.

tags.name: Thumbnail
tags.description: Specifies a thumbnail image URL with optional dimensions in pixels for badge definitions.

tags.name: Title
tags.description: Specifies a title for long-form content, calendar events, live events, or classified listings.

tags.name: Torrent Tracker
tags.description: Specifies a torrent tracker URL for torrent-related events.

tags.name: URL
tags.description: Generic URL tag for associating a web address with an event.

tags.name: Webpage URL
tags.description: Specifies a webpage URL for git repository events.

tags.name: Zap Split
tags.description: Specifies zap split recipients. Each zap tag defines a pubkey, relay URL, and weight (stringified integer) for proportional zap distribution.
